name: Zovek 'Vadam
description:
The former Elite warrior never had a human mate before...

....especially one that was the granddaughter of his archenemy.

"But I set fire to the rain! Watch it pour as I touched your face! Well, it burned while I cried 'cause I heard it screaming out your name."

(A Sangheili OC of mine. Hope you like him! Plus, picture is from the Halo TV show)
creator: PinkietheDragon
